title: The Dalhurst Job
description: A merchant warehouse in Dalhurst is full of valuable imported goods. Vex wants you to plan and execute a heist. Choose your approach: quick smash-and-grab, careful infiltration, or social deception.

objectives.description: Scout the warehouse and identify security
Report findings and choose your approach
Steal at least 5 crates of valuable goods
Deliver goods to the Guild safehouse

approach_options.name: stealth_infiltration
approach_options.description: Pick locks, avoid guards, take your time
approach_options.risks: Takes longer, but minimal detection risk

approach_options.name: smash_and_grab
approach_options.description: Break in, grab what you can, run
approach_options.risks: Fast but loud, guards will pursue

approach_options.name: social_deception
approach_options.description: Pose as inspectors, walk out with goods
approach_options.risks: If discovered, burns future social approaches

notes: Promotion to Burglar. Multiple approach options. Rewards Guild armor. Warehouse in Dalhurst docks.
